title: Software Release Quality Assurance Checklist
purpose: Ensure all software releases meet quality standards before deployment to production.
scope: Applies to all software engineers, QA engineers, and release managers involved in production deployments.

responsibilities.responsibility: Execute the test plan, document test results, and sign off on release readiness.
Coordinate the release schedule, approve deployment, and communicate status to stakeholders.
Resolve defects identified during QA and confirm fixes in staging.

steps.title: Code Freeze
steps.instruction: Announce code freeze to all engineering teams. No new features may be merged after this point.
steps.expected_output: Code freeze announcement sent; all feature branches merged or deferred.
cautions: Hotfixes for critical security issues may bypass code freeze with manager approval.

steps.title: Deploy to Staging
steps.instruction: Deploy the release candidate to the staging environment using the automated deployment pipeline.
steps.expected_output: Release candidate running on staging environment; deployment log saved.

steps.title: Execute Regression Test Suite
steps.instruction: Run the full automated regression test suite against the staging environment. Document pass/fail results.
steps.expected_output: Test report generated with pass rate and list of failures.

steps.title: Conduct Manual Exploratory Testing
steps.instruction: Perform manual testing of new features and high-risk areas identified in the release notes.
steps.expected_output: Exploratory testing log with any defects filed in the issue tracker.

steps.title: File and Triage Defects
steps.instruction: File defects in the issue tracker. Classify each as Critical, High, Medium, or Low priority.

steps.title: Release Approval
steps.instruction: Release Manager reviews test report and approves the release for production deployment.
steps.expected_output: Written release approval recorded in the project management system.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.instruction: Execute the production deployment during the scheduled maintenance window.
steps.expected_output: Production deployment complete; smoke tests passing.
cautions: Monitor error rates and latency for 30 minutes after deployment.
